actual_result.note: Low-event draw; Colombia protected first place and Portugal could not convert must-win pressure.

market_calibration_error.ordinary_1x2_calibration_read: Market also made Portugal the favorite, but its draw probability was slightly above the model; favorite lean misled the primary direction while draw signal was usable.
market_calibration_error.handicap_actual_bucket: Colombia +1 win because the real match was draw
market_calibration_error.handicap_calibration_read: Handicap layer supported Colombia protection more than the ordinary 1X2 direction; actual landed inside the protected bucket.

postmatch_error.summary: The model and market leaned Portugal, while the actual 0-0 rewarded Colombia draw-enough control and low-event suppression.

factor_error.market_signal: Market favorite signal was absorbed more than the draw/control signal; draw no-vig was close to model but still not enough to offset Portugal direction.
factor_error.tactical_signal: Colombia game-management, defensive compactness, and Portugal frustration against a draw-enough opponent were underweighted.
factor_error.player_state_signal: Portugal attacking names were over-counted relative to actual chance conversion and Colombia defensive state.

score_tail_error.diagnosis: 0-0 was outside Top5 despite a 7.0% matrix probability. The low-event clean draw branch should have been more visible for a leader needing only a draw.

draw_floor_error.diagnosis: This is a clean draw-floor miss: group context and market both supported draw risk, but primary direction stayed with Portugal.

third_round_context_error.diagnosis: The model read Portugal must-win pressure as attacking edge, but did not sufficiently model Colombia slowing the game once a draw protected first place.

actual_result.note: DR Congo win direction hit; must-win second-half pressure produced a 3-1 tail rather than the lower-score cluster.

market_calibration_error.ordinary_1x2_calibration_read: Market was slightly stronger than the model on DR Congo win and helped the direction layer.
market_calibration_error.handicap_actual_bucket: DR Congo -1 win because DR Congo won by two goals
market_calibration_error.handicap_calibration_read: Market priced the two-plus margin higher than the model; actual confirmed that the model underweighted the cover tail.

postmatch_error.summary: DR Congo win direction hit, but 3-1, over 2.5, over 3.5, and -1 cover tail were underweighted.

factor_error.market_signal: Market was closer on DR Congo win and two-plus margin than the model, so market calibration helped but was not absorbed enough into margin/tail.
factor_error.tactical_signal: Must-win aggression and Uzbekistan open-game vulnerability were capped too tightly after a low-event first-cluster baseline.
factor_error.player_state_signal: Uzbekistan defensive fragility and DR Congo second-half attacking lift were underweighted; Uzbekistan still retained enough attack for one goal.

score_tail_error.diagnosis: 3-1 sat outside Top5 with about 4.5% mass. The model covered 2-1 but did not push enough probability into the must-win 3-goal home tail.

draw_floor_error.diagnosis: Draw floor was not the miss; both teams needed wins and the actual game confirmed a lower draw relevance than the 25.5% published draw.

third_round_context_error.diagnosis: The model identified DR Congo must-win context, but did not sufficiently convert it into second-half acceleration, Uzbekistan collapse exposure, and two-plus margin probability.

data_packet.scope: K组第三轮两场赛后事实包，用于复盘与成员表 partial 更新。

facts: 哥伦比亚以平局锁定K组第一，葡萄牙第二出线。
哥伦比亚射门数量明显更多；补时阶段达文森·桑切斯头球被VAR/越位判定取消。
迪奥戈·科斯塔多次关键扑救，詹姆斯·罗德里格斯、科尔多瓦、阿里亚斯等制造威胁。
葡萄牙进攻端节奏偏急，C罗和布鲁诺的终结质量未能兑现赛前xG倾向。

matches.match_cn: 刚果金 3-1 乌兹别克斯坦
facts: 乌兹别克斯坦第10分钟由埃尔多尔·肖穆罗多夫先入一球。
刚果金下半场反扑，约阿内·维萨第68分钟点球扳平，菲斯顿·马耶莱第78分钟反超，维萨补时再入一球。
刚果金完成逆转并获得队史/本届关键胜利，三球尾部和让球穿盘明显高于赛前中位数。
乌兹别克斯坦连续多场防线承压，领先后仍未守住低位，后段追分与体能崩盘共同放大失球。

source_log.name: Sky Sports DR Congo 3-1 Uzbekistan match report

data_gaps: 官方逐人完整出场分钟、扑救、预期进球、黄红牌、同源外部球员评分未完全闭合。
葡萄牙、哥伦比亚部分首发名单来自媒体快照，仍需赛会/官方技术报告复核。
刚果金3-1乌兹别克斯坦的点球制造者、全部换人和补时细节需官方事件表补齐。
